tagline: We Make Pool Care Stress-Free with Our Exceptional Service!

hero.headline:
Crystal Clear Pools, Zero
Stress for You
hero.subheadline: With 15+ years and 5,000+ pools cleaned across Phoenix, our CPO-certified technicians handle every detail so you never lift a finger. Just step outside and dive in.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Expert Pool Care That Keeps<br class="hidden md:block">Your Water Perfect
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green pool rescues, our team of 12+ CPO-certified professionals delivers reliable, detail-oriented service across the Phoenix metro.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly care including filter maintenance, water testing and balancing, equipment checks, and chemical optimization to keep your pool crystal clear year-round.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair for pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems. We work with Pentair, Jandy, and Hayward to get your equipment running like new.

cards.title: Green-to-Blue Recovery
cards.description: Pool turned swamp green? Our specialized restoration process brings it back to sparkling blue in days. Includes skimming, vacuuming, and full chemical rebalancing.

cards.title: Filter Deep Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough filter maintenance including inspection, disassembly, deep cleaning, and reassembly to restore optimal water flow and filtration performance.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Precision water chemistry that keeps your pool safe, clear, and gentle on skin. We test and adjust every visit so you never worry about balance.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Prep
cards.description: Get your pool ready for Arizona's intense summer or cooled-down winter months. Full equipment check, chemical reset, and system tuning included.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll send a CPO-certified tech for a complimentary inspection and honest quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our team of 12+ certified professionals arrives on schedule every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and detailed service notes — all handled.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready and sparkling every single day. If you're ever less than thrilled, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Phoenix Trusts Us
about.headline: 15+ Years of Keeping Arizona Pools Perfect
about.description: Aqua Harmony Pools is a locally-owned, family-operated pool care company serving the greater Phoenix area since 2011. With over 5,000 pools cleaned and 720+ happy clients, our team of 12+ CPO-certified technicians combines deep industry knowledge with the latest techniques. We're BBB A+ Accredited, Google Guaranteed, and Top Rated on HomeAdvisor — because earning your trust is everything.

features.title: All Technicians CPO-Certified
features.description: Every member of our 12-person team holds Certified Pool Operator credentials, ensuring expert care for your pool every visit.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises — just great service.

features.title: 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not thrilled with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. With a 5.0 Google rating, we stand behind every job.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Sparkling Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back and redo the job at absolutely no cost. We've built our 5-star reputation on doing things right, and we won't stop until your pool proves it.

faqs.question: How fast can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response across the Phoenix metro. Just call (480) 542-7341 and we'll get you set up.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're out. After each visit, you'll receive a detailed service summary so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: We're compatible with all major brands including Pentair, Jandy, and Hayward. Our CPO-certified technicians are trained to diagnose and repair pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems from any manufacturer.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel my service?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no penalties, no hassle. We believe great service should speak for itself — that's how we've maintained a 5.0 Google rating with 720+ happy clients.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Phoenix, Goodyear, Glendale, and all surrounding communities within 30 miles of Phoenix, Arizona. If you're in the greater Phoenix metro area, we've got you covered.

testimonials.name: Michael G.
testimonials.text: Very dependable and trustworthy, the prices are reasonable and they are very knowledgeable about what they are doing. My pool was completely gone and within three days it was crystal clear. This service is awesome.

testimonials.name: Vince A.
testimonials.text: Over the years I've had many pool service providers, but this one moves to the top of the list! The professionalism, friendliness, and knowledge about all aspects of pool maintenance, chemicals, and operations is outstanding.

testimonials.name: Melinda N.
testimonials.text: Aqua Harmony saved my pool when I thought it was a lost cause. They have been excellent at keeping my pool clean ever since. Highly recommend them to anyone in the Phoenix area.
